title: Health Indicator
description: A beautiful, PvP-ready health display mod for Fabric! Shows player/mob HP via Vanilla Hearts, sleek Health Bars, or clean numbers over player/mob heads.
body:
## Health Indicator+

See the health of every living entity — right above their head. Beautiful, lightweight, and fully configurable.

---

**❤️ What is Health Indicator+?**

Health Indicator+ renders real-time health displays above the heads of all living entities — players, mobs, and animals. Choose between three stunning display modes, fine-tune every detail in the premium built-in config screen, and enjoy buttery-smooth performance even in crowded PvP and survival environments.

Built from the ground up for **Minecraft 1.21.11** using the modern rendering pipeline. No legacy hacks, no flickering — just clean, reliable health data exactly where you need it.

---

**🎮 Three Display Modes**

- **❤️ Hearts** — Vanilla-style hearts floating above the entity. Shows containers, full/half hearts, and golden absorption hearts. Adjustable size and spacing.
- **📊 Bar** — A sleek health bar with dynamic fill color that shifts from green → yellow → red as health drops. Optional segmented mode and HP label overlay.
- **🔢 Numeric** — Clean text readout (e.g. `14.5/20`) that billboards toward the camera. Perfect for competitive PvP where you need exact numbers.

Press **H** to instantly cycle between modes in-game. Your choice is saved automatically.

---

**⚙️ Premium Config Screen**

Press **.** (period) to open the built-in settings panel — no external config libraries needed.

The dark, translucent pop-up features:
- Animated gradient header with red accent
- Pill-style toggles for quick on/off switches
- Smooth gradient sliders for precise value control
- Glowing mode selection buttons
- Smooth scroll for all settings
- One-click color presets

Everything saves instantly. No restart required.

---

![Heart Indicator + Config Screen Part 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce19620a8a1ca006aab5fbc5174d8c107cb4b52f.png)![Heart Indicator + Config Screen Part 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0c2df9339e4e8842205183d54ea310dfb53debc.png)![Heart Indicator + Config Screen Part 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36778b0d111d890468e5b747324114ddb56387d5.png)

---

**🎨 Color Presets**

Get started instantly with hand-crafted presets:

- **PvP Clean** — High-contrast white/red numeric display with flash + shake effects. Designed for competitive play.
- **Vanilla+** — Classic red hearts with team color support. Feels like it belongs in the base game.
- **Streamer** — Subtle semi-transparent bar mode. Unobtrusive for content creation.

Or customize every color individually: Healthy, Caution, Danger, and Critical thresholds.

---

**✨ Visual Effects**

- **Flash Effect** — Health indicator pulses when the entity is low on health. Configurable low and critical thresholds.
- **Shake Effect** — Indicator shakes when health is critically low, drawing your attention in combat.
- **Distance Scaling** — Indicators smoothly scale down with distance for a natural, immersive look.
- **Team Colors** — Automatically uses scoreboard team colors when available.

---

**👁️ Visibility Controls**

- **Max Render Distance** — Set how far indicators appear (up to 64 blocks)
- **Hide When Sneaking** — Respects crouching players
- **Hide When Invisible** — Respects invisibility potions
- **Line of Sight** — Only show indicators for entities you can actually see
- **Show on Self** — Toggle your own health display on/off

---

**🔧 Fine-Tuning**

Every aspect is configurable:

- X/Y position offset above the entity
- Base scale multiplier
- Bar width, height, segmented mode, label visibility
- Heart scale (3 sizes), spacing, absorption display
- Numeric decimal precision, max HP display, scale

---

**📦 Lightweight & Compatible**

- **Client-side only** — No server installation needed
- **Zero external config dependencies** — No Cloth Config required
- **Mod Menu integration** — Settings button appears in Mod Menu if installed
- **Fabric API** — Only dependency
- **Performant** — Uses vanilla VertexConsumerProvider with efficient health caching

---

**⌨️ Keybindings**

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| **H** | Cycle display mode (Hearts → Bar → Numeric) |
| **.** (period) | Open config screen |

---

**📋 Requirements**

- Minecraft **1.21.9 - 1.21.11**
- Fabric Loader **0.16.5+**
- Fabric API

---
